## Checklist

- [ ] `cd app && ./run-tests.sh` passes
- [ ] For web changes, `cd web && npm run build` passes
- [ ] I added/updated tests for behavior changes
- [ ] No new third-party **runtime** dependency was added to the app
- [ ] Cleanup/file operations still only ever move to the Trash (if applicable)
- [ ] Nothing in this change sends data off-device
